scripts.build:clean: bash scripts/cleanup-stale-target.sh && bash scripts/clean-shared-build.sh && yarn build:man && env CARGO_TARGET_DIR="${GIT_MESH_CARGO_TARGET_ROOT:-$HOME/.cache/git-mesh/cargo-target}/build" cargo build --release
scripts.lint: env RUSTFLAGS="-W unused -W dead-code" CARGO_TARGET_DIR="${GIT_MESH_CARGO_TARGET_ROOT:-$HOME/.cache/git-mesh/cargo-target}/lint" cargo clippy --quiet -- -D warnings
scripts.typecheck: env RUSTFLAGS="-W unused -W dead-code" CARGO_TARGET_DIR="${GIT_MESH_CARGO_TARGET_ROOT:-$HOME/.cache/git-mesh/cargo-target}/typecheck" cargo check --quiet --locked
